metadata.description: Shipeasy — feature flags, A/B experiments, event metrics, translations, and in-app feedback. One plugin, one MCP registration.

plugins.name: shipeasy
plugins.description: End-to-end Shipeasy: SDK install + auth + bind, experiments, metrics, gates, configs, kill switches, alert rules, translations, and feedback. Bundles the same 12 skills as the Claude Code and Codex plugins plus the shipeasy MCP server — no content duplicated. All CRUD is delegated to the shipeasy MCP server or CLI.
